name: Umbral Arousa
descrip: Powerful Erotic magic that arouses your target. Can Charm.
outcome: [AttackerName] lifts a monsterous clawed hand to point towards [TargetName], generating a twisting mass of ominous green and black magic that upon filling her entire palm, she fires the pulsing, crackling orb at [TargetName], who is caught in its sinfully seductive blast, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] trembling and gasping as hot melty pleasure surges across [TargetHisOrHer] entire body in ricocheting waves.
miss: [AttackerName] lifts a monsterous clawed hand to point towards [TargetName], generating a twisting mass of ominous green and black magic that upon filling her entire palm, she fires the pulsing, crackling orb at [TargetName], but [TargetHeOrShe] narrowly avoids it!
statusOutcome: The aftershocks of the perverse spell send aching, enchanting heat thrumming through [TargetName], and [TargetHisOrHer] cock throbs with charmed desire for [AttackerName]'s attentions!
